initial_prompt:
Super-Eywa v1 runtime prompt snapshot.
Turn index: 1
Node depth: 0
Allowed decisions: ['transmute']
Prompt family: transmute
Base header prompt: ''
Selected prompt text:
Transform the provided problem into a rigorous, formal technical specification. Your goal is to strip away all narrative elements and provide a precise mathematical description of the input constraints, the required properties of the output set, and the optimization objective (e.g., lexicographical minimality or length minimality). Ensure the specification clearly defines the relationship between the input strings and the required output strings (such as the prefix-free constraint) so that a developer could implement a correct algorithmic solution without needing the original story context. Do not include specific names or example values from the problem.

Return exactly one JSON object in this format:
{
  "schema_name": "eywa_node_response",
  "schema_version": "v1",
  "orchestration_decision": "transmute",
  "decision_notes": "optional string",
  "message_for_next_agent": "plain-text reformulation for the next agent"
}

Question:
Solve this Super-Eywa grading-bank question.
Question ID: coding-B1-usaco-2024-us-open-platinum-identity-theft
Title: B1. USACO 2024 US Open Platinum / Identity Theft

Problem:
Extend cows' bitstring IDs so no cow can be mistaken for another when some reported IDs are truncated.

Grading target:
Binary hidden-test acceptance.

Return format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>
